evidence_ledger_entries.public_safe_note: Boundary document references only; no readiness, legal, patent, customer, paid-launch, or deployment claim is made.
Public-safe witness packet references only; no secret, private, customer, reviewer, account, provider, or live endpoint evidence is recorded.
Validator references only; local validators do not prove legal clearance, patent protection, customer readiness, paid launch, or deployment readiness.
Focused test references only; targeted tests do not prove full product, customer, public-runtime, or deployment readiness.
Saved preflight receipt reference only; a preflight receipt is not terminal closure or external readiness.
Source-control packet reference only; no staging, commit, push, pull request, publication, or deployment is authorized.
Readiness snapshot reference only; no public readiness, legal clearance, customer readiness, paid launch, or deployment readiness is promoted.
Public-copy routing references only; no external publication, access invitation, waitlist, beta, pilot, customer intake, paid launch, or deployment is authorized.

next_action: continue organizing evidence references locally; do not promote evidence, claim terminal closure, claim readiness, claim legal clearance, claim patent protection, claim customer readiness, launch paid use, record secret evidence, publish externally, or deploy
